body_txt: The juvenile serial dater. He hasn't even graduated from middle school yet, and he's already gone through as many girls as The Casanova — possibly more, school dating being what it is . The only thing that differentiates him from The Casanova is that — because of his age and his show's target demographics — it's highly unlikely that he and his dates are having sex. At least, it'll be a cold day in hell before the Media Watchdogs let anybody even think about it. Compare Chick Magnet and Dirty Kid . His Distaff Counterpart is the Fille Fatale . If he's young enough, this may result in Puppy Love . Not a child-friendly version of a statistical analysis technique. May overlap with The Troublemaker .
